title: equisetum × occidentale f. ramigerum
intro: Equisetum × occidentale f. ramigerum is a hybrid plant species of the Equisetum genus, specifically a variant of the western scouring rush (Equisetum × occidentale) with branching stems. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Equisetum × occidentale f. ramigerum include its potential to support kidney and urinary health, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
